summary: Company Admin Restructure - Succursale Management Testing Complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI flows verified: Sidebar updated (Agents & POS Devices removed, Succursales added), succursale creation with supervisor, succursale detail modal with agents table, agent creation within succursale.

issues: Minor React hydration warning - <tr> and <span> in tbody - cosmetic, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar correctly updated - Agents and POS Devices menus removed, Succursales menu added
New hierarchy implemented: Company Admin → Succursales → Agents (agents must belong to a succursale)
Succursale creation form includes all required fields: supervisor info, optional user info, succursale details
Agent creation only available inside succursale detail modal (not standalone)
Soft delete implemented for both succursales and agents
Succursale cannot be deleted if it has active agents - proper validation
Device ID uniqueness enforced when creating agents
seed_data_creation: Created test succursale 'Test Succursale 3990' with supervisor 'SuperPrenom3990 SuperNom3990'. Created test agent 'AgentPrenom AgentNom54798' with device ID DEV54798 in existing succursale.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Company Admin restructure complete. Succursales feature fully functional. Test data: 'Succursale Port-au-Prince Centre' has 2 agents (Marc Dupont and newly created agent). 'Test Succursale 3990' exists with 0 agents. All CRUD operations for succursales and agents within them are working.
